curation_notes: Re-curated with updated hint guidelines. Locations derived from the patch diff: src/normalize-unicode.ts (normalizeUnicode function) where NFD normalization was extended with toLocaleLowerCase and toLocaleUpperCase to handle Unicode ligature collisions, and src/path-reservations.ts (reserve method) where the redundant toLowerCase call was removed. Vulnerability class race-condition confirmed from CWE-367 (TOCTOU), the advisory description, and the patch behavior. L1 broadened to cover the extraction and path management layer without revealing specific modules. L3 narrowed to Unicode normalization and concurrent entry scheduling subsystem with macOS APFS context.
